name: Colesville Towers
bathroomsNote: 2BR plans come in 1BA (1,162 sq ft) and 2BA (1,358 sq ft) configurations; 1BR plans are 1BA

notes.doorman: Explicitly described as '24-hour attended front desk' across RentCafe, PadMapper, Zumper, and the building's own search-result snippet. Treated as Confirmed 24h.
notes.unitClimate: Heat and AC are controlled on a building-wide seasonal schedule tied to county requirements: AC runs mid-May through early October, heat from October through April. Residents cannot switch independently. Marked No (building-controlled).
notes.inUnitLaundry: All listing sources describe an on-site laundry center (shared/common area). No source confirms in-unit washer/dryer. Some review snippets note machines are sometimes out of order.
notes.balcony: Listed as 'large patio/balcony' at the unit level across multiple sources, described as a standard feature with city and park views.
notes.wellMaintained: Mixed reviews: some residents praise prompt maintenance (issues resolved within 24 hours); others cite aging AC/pipe systems and grounds that appear neglected. ApartmentRatings overall ~4.1/5 from 385+ reviews; maintenance sub-rating ~3.7/5. Marked Unclear.
notes.packageRoom: Package service is listed as a building amenity. Front desk handles packages; some resident reviews note occasional theft concerns and lack of floor-level security cameras.
notes.petFriendly: Cats and dogs allowed, max 2 pets per unit; $250 refundable deposit + $25/month per pet. Breed restrictions: pit bulls, rottweilers, chows prohibited. No weight limit.
notes.has2BRor1BRDen: 2BR/1BA and 2BR/2BA floor plans confirmed. No 1BR+den plan identified in any source.
notes.buildingDetails: Mid-rise apartment, 11 stories, ~260-275 units, built 1966. Managed by ROSS Companies (Ross Management Services). Most utilities included in rent. Garage and street parking. Additional amenities: bike storage, billiards room, grilling area, sun deck, business center, his-and-hers saunas noted in some sources.
notes.additionalPhones: (833) 358-4212 (RentCafe listing); ext. 4685 on the (844) number per Zumper
notes.currentOffer: As of June 2026: 1 month free on select units; $1,000 off if you apply within 72 hours of touring (move-in by 06/30/2026)
